WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: sei Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 0b1ff34ada\'']['Input text \'txtPesquisaRapida\''] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 MousePositionRelativeToElement: WebAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''%numero_processo%{Enter}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 150 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: sei Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 30c2e44198\'']['Image \'Incluir Documento\''])
WebAutomation.ExecuteJavascript BrowserInstance: sei Javascript: $'''function ExecuteScript() {
x = window.top
   .document.querySelector(\'iframe\').contentDocument.getElementsByClassName(\'infraArvoreNo\')
last = \'\'
for (var i = 0; i < x.length; i++) {
    idAnchor = x[i].id
    id = idAnchor.split(\"anchor\")[1]

    doc = window.top
       .document.querySelector(\'iframe\').contentDocument.querySelector(`a[popoverid=anchorImg${id}]`)
    doc_number = \'\'
    if (doc != null) {
      doc_number = doc.children[1].textContent
    }

    folder = x[i].parentElement.id.split(\'div\')[1]


last = last.concat(id, \'$$$$\', doc_number, \'$$$$\', x[i].textContent, \'$$$$\', folder, \'////\')
  }
return last
}''' Result=> documentos
WAIT 5
Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: documentos CustomDelimiter: $'''////''' IsRegEx: False Result=> documentos_lista
Variables.CreateNewDatatable InputTable: { ^['id', 'doc_number', 'documento', 'pasta'], [$'''''', $'''''', $'''''', $''''''] } DataTable=> documentos_tabela
LOOP FOREACH documento IN documentos_lista
    Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: documento CustomDelimiter: $'''$$$$''' IsRegEx: False Result=> documento_id
    SET pasta TO $'''n/a'''
    IF (documento_id.Count = 4 AND NotStartsWith(documento_id[0], 'PASTA')) = $'''TRUE''' THEN
        Variables.AddRowToDataTable.AppendRowToDataTable DataTable: documentos_tabela RowToAdd: documento_id
    END
END
Variables.DeleteRowFromDataTable DataTable: documentos_tabela RowIndex: 0
